title: Wind-Farm Turbine Micrositing: Maximum Wake-Free Completion
strategies: install-nothing baseline: echo only the pre-placed turbines (reproduces the checker baseline, ~0.1)
row-major smallest-model greedy: fast but dead-ends, leaving slots empty
most-constrained-variable (MRV) greedy: fills tighter slots first, reaches more cells
MRV backtracking search for a full wake-free Latin completion, with best-partial recording and greedy fallbacks -- installs the most turbines
